title: Aldera Universal Medcenter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Aldera Universal Medcenter''' was a twelve-building [[Medcenter/Legends|hospital]] complex located in [[Aldera/Legends|Aldera]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. The AUM was equipped with the most up-to-date facilities for treating almost every known [[Species/Legends|species]]. Known for its compassion of its patients as much as for its medical advances, no patient admitted to Aldera Universal was turned away if they could not pay.<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

Aldera Universal also included a medical school and a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] research-and-development facility. For a fee, people could study and train under the staff of Aldera Universal and become staff members themselves.<ref name="CCW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''
